calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Dec-17-2001 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner is sworn and examined. The Petition for Change of Name is granted as prayed. Petitioner's name is changed to: ELIAH MATTHEW MOUNTJOY. Decree signed. Judge: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: D. Carter; Reporter: Norma Reay.
